title: Đại từ (2) — Đại từ bất định
summary: Cách dùng some, any, no với danh từ.

sections.heading: 1. Some, Any, No, None
sections.body:
**Some:**
- Câu **khẳng định** + danh từ đếm được số nhiều / không đếm được: *We bought **some** bread.*
- Câu hỏi **mời mọc/đề nghị**: *Would you like **some** coffee?*
- Trước DT số ít = 'nào đó': ***Some** man at the door wants to see you.*

**Any:**
- Câu **phủ định** và **câu hỏi**: *I haven't read **any** books.* / *Do you have **any** questions?*
- Câu khẳng định = '**bất cứ**': *Please phone me **any** day next week.*

**No** = Not any (tính từ hạn định, đứng trước DT): *There is **no** coffee.* / ***No** words can express my happiness.*

**None** (đại từ, đứng độc lập hoặc + of): ***None** of the guests want to stay.* / *How many tickets? — **None**.*

**Lưu ý:**
- *without any* = *with no*: *I passed the exam **without any** difficulties.*
- *hardly any* = hầu như không có: *I have **hardly any** free time.*

sections.heading: 2. Đại từ kết hợp: Someone, Anything, Nobody…
sections.body:
| some- | any- | no- |
|---|---|---|
| someone / somebody | anyone / anybody | no one / nobody |
| something | anything | nothing |
| somewhere | anywhere | nowhere |

- Tất cả chia động từ **số ít**: ***Everyone** is ready.*
- Có thể dùng sở hữu cách: *took **someone's** report*
- Thêm **else**: *Is there **anything else**?*
- **Tránh phủ định kép:** *I can't find my wallet **anywhere*** ✓ (không dùng: *can't find nowhere*)

sections.heading: 3. One, Another, Other, The other
sections.body:
Với một nhóm xác định (VD: 4 cây bút):
- **One** is red. **Another** is blue. **Another** is black. **The other** is grey.

| Từ | Vai trò | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **other** + N số nhiều | Tính từ | **Other** people may disagree. |
| **others** | Đại từ = other + N | Some drink beer. **Others** drink wine. |
| **the other** + N / đứng riêng | Cái còn lại (xác định) | He has two shops. **The other** is in Phuoc Binh. |
| **the others** | Đại từ = the other + N | I've done all **the others**. |
| **another** + N số ít | Thêm một cái nữa | Would you like **another** cup of coffee? |

**Cụm từ:** *from one to **another***; *on one hand… on **the other** hand…*

**Phân biệt:** ***each other*** (2 người) vs ***one another*** (3+ người)

sections.heading: 4. Both, Each, Every, All
sections.body:
**Both** (cả hai) + V số nhiều:
- *Both + N số nhiều*: ***Both** men were interested.*
- *Both S1 **and** S2 + V số nhiều*: ***Both** the teacher **and** her student like Chelsea.*

**Each / Every** + N đếm được số ít + V số ít:
- ***Each** has a different colour.* / ***Every** student is afraid.*
- **Each** có thể đứng sau DT: *The students **each** need to have a notebook.* (Every thì không)

**All** + N số nhiều + V số nhiều:
- *All (of the) students are ready.* = *We **all** are ready.*
- **Everyone/Everybody/Everything** → V số ít; **All people** → V số nhiều

sections.heading: 5. Either, Neither
sections.body:
- **Either/Neither** + N số ít: *Trees grow on **either** side.* / ***Neither** student is good.*
- **Either/Neither of** + the + N số nhiều + V số ít: ***Neither of** the students understands.*
- Liên từ: ***Either** S1 **or** S2 + V(S2)*; ***Neither** S1 **nor** S2 + V(S2)*
- Tương tự: *Not only S1 but also S2 + V(S2)*

sections.heading: 6. Most, Almost, Mostly
sections.body:
- **Most** + N số nhiều (chung chung): ***Most** people like music.*
- **Most of the** + N (xác định): ***Most of the** students passed.*
- **Almost** (trạng từ) = gần như: *Dinner is **almost** ready.* / ***Almost** every student is afraid.*
- **Mostly** = chủ yếu: *We **mostly** go out on Sunday.*

sections.heading: 7. Few / A few / Little / A little
sections.body:
| | Đếm được (số nhiều) | Không đếm được |
|---|---|---|
| **Tích cực** (có một ít, đủ dùng) | **a few** | **a little** |
| **Tiêu cực** (rất ít, không đủ) | **few** | **little** |

- *We have **a little** time before the train leaves. Let's go for a drink.* (đủ thời gian)
- *He spoke **little** English, so it was difficult to communicate.* (quá ít)
- ***Fewer*** + đếm được; ***less*** + không đếm được: *Eat **fewer** sweets and drink **less** wine.*

exercises.question: I was too surprised to say _______.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc 'too … to' mang nghĩa phủ định → dùng anything.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Đại Từ 2 (ET1032)
exerciseSets.description: 40 câu trắc nghiệm nâng cao: đại từ sở hữu, phản thân, lượng từ, đại từ bất định trong ngữ cảnh phức tạp.

exercises.question: One of _______ has to take the responsibility for setting up the experiment.
exercises.explanation: One of + đại từ tân ngữ số nhiều → us.

exercises.question: We have already filled in _______.
exercises.explanation: Chủ ngữ 'We' → our (forms); đại từ sở hữu thay cho 'her form' → hers.

exercises.question: You can take _______ of these two elective courses; they are _______ very interesting.
exercises.explanation: Either of two = một trong hai; they are both = cả hai đều.

exercises.question: Could you lend me _______ more? I've spent _______ money you gave me yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Lịch sự yêu cầu → some; 'money you gave me' xác định → the.

exercises.question: There have been _______ innovative policies to combat traffic congestion, and as a result, traffic continues to be a major problem.
exercises.explanation: Few = rất ít (nghĩa phủ định) → ít chính sách nên giao thông vẫn tệ.

exercises.question: If you want the job done well, you had better do _______ _______.
exercises.explanation: Do it yourself = tự mình làm. 'it' thay cho 'the job'.

exercises.question: The group monitoring the election estimated that about ten percent of the ballots were not counted for _______.
exercises.explanation: For one reason or another = vì lý do này hay lý do khác.

exercises.question: _______ who was arrested during the riots was released since it couldn't be proved that they had done _______ against the law.
exercises.explanation: Everyone was released; couldn't be proved → anything (phủ định).

exercises.question: I can't possibly allow _______ of you to enter the house with your shoes covered with _______ mud.
exercises.explanation: Can't allow any of you; 'mud' không đếm được → so much mud.

exercises.question: You may not be impressed with _______ ideas, but are _______ any better?
exercises.explanation: My ideas; are your own (ideas) any better?

exercises.question: She found _______ without any friends after alienating _______ all with her unpleasant behavior.
exercises.explanation: Found herself = thấy mình; alienating them all = làm xa lánh tất cả họ.

exercises.question: Don't worry. After _______ rest she'll be all right.
exercises.explanation: A little rest = nghỉ ngơi một chút (nghĩa tích cực).

exercises.question: _______ who knows _______ about literature takes Jeffrey Archer seriously as a novelist.
exercises.explanation: No one who knows anything = không ai biết gì (về văn học) lại coi trọng.

exercises.question: _______ university in the country would like to have such _______ well-known academic on its staff.
exercises.explanation: Every + danh từ số ít; such a + tính từ + danh từ.

exercises.question: I spent the _______ day at the library trying to find the articles I needed for my research.
exercises.explanation: The whole day = cả ngày. (all day cũng đúng nhưng không có 'the').

exercises.question: Take _______ things or you'll regret it; don't take _______ jewellery either.
exercises.explanation: Few things = ít đồ (đếm được); much jewellery (không đếm được, phủ định).

exercises.question: Couldn't you have answered _______ more questions on the exam? You have hardly answered _______.
exercises.explanation: A few more questions; hardly answered any = hầu như không trả lời câu nào.

exercises.question: I was prepared to have to give my speech in an almost empty hall so it was something of a surprise to see that quite _______ students did in fact attend.
exercises.explanation: Quite a few = khá nhiều (bất ngờ vì tưởng ít).

exercises.question: There will be _______ film festival in which _______ of the films come from Middle Eastern countries.
exercises.explanation: A film festival (mạo từ không xác định); all of the films.

exercises.question: Not _______ can be done to help her if she herself doesn't put in quite _______ effort to put her own life in order.
exercises.explanation: Not much can be done; a lot of effort (không đếm được).

exercises.question: I'm not lazy but I think we have _______ public holidays. We ought to have more.
exercises.explanation: Too few + danh từ đếm được số nhiều = quá ít ngày nghỉ.

exercises.question: The doctor told me I had to eat _______ sweets and drink _______ wine if I wanted to lose _______ kilos.
exercises.explanation: Fewer sweets (đếm được); less wine (không đếm được); a few kilos (đếm được, một vài).

exercises.question: He was an extremely entertaining speaker, so we all enjoyed _______ even more than we had expected to.
exercises.explanation: We enjoyed ourselves = chúng tôi rất vui.

exercises.question: Though the cloakroom was very crowded, she managed to find _______ coat fairly quickly, but it took me a long time to find _______.
exercises.explanation: Her coat (tính từ sở hữu + danh từ); mine (đại từ sở hữu thay 'my coat').

exercises.question: My books are still on the table where I left _______, but _______ have been stolen.
exercises.explanation: Left them (đại từ tân ngữ); hers have been stolen (đại từ sở hữu = her books).

exercises.question: I am so lonely and bored in this town; _______ ever invites me _______.
exercises.explanation: Nobody (phủ định) + anywhere. Tránh phủ định kép (no one + nowhere).

exercises.question: They are worried that if the decline in the number of the Siberian tigers continues at this high rate, _______ of the species will be left in a few years.
exercises.explanation: None of the species will be left = không còn cá thể nào.

exercises.question: "How much are those melons?" — "Two dollars _______."
exercises.explanation: Two dollars each = mỗi quả hai đô.

exercises.question: The contract does not mean anything legally without the signatures of _______ sides.
exercises.explanation: Both sides = cả hai bên.

exercises.question: We are _______ in search of happiness, but to _______ of us, it means a different thing.
exercises.explanation: We are all = tất cả chúng ta; to each of us = với mỗi người.

exercises.question: His parents did not really give _______ _______ support, yet he still managed to become successful.
exercises.explanation: Give him (tân ngữ) their support (tính từ sở hữu + danh từ).

exercises.question: _______ of you is going to be questioned by the police about your whereabouts at the time of the crime.
exercises.explanation: Each of you + động từ số ít (is going). Every không đi với 'of you'.

exercises.question: You can see _______ people jogging along _______ side of the river in the morning.
exercises.explanation: A lot of people; either side = bên nào cũng (của sông, 2 bên).

exercises.question: Almost _______ children love sweets, so it's unusual that _______ do not eat them at all.
exercises.explanation: Almost all children; yours (= your children) do not eat them.

exercises.question: Sam didn't know _______ fish had been in the bowl before the cat had got _______ of them.
exercises.explanation: How many fish (đếm được); the cat had got some of them.

exercises.question: _______ time he was a student, he did _______ but go to parties.
exercises.explanation: The whole time = suốt thời gian; did nothing but = chẳng làm gì ngoài.

exercises.question: Colours can affect our emotions; _______ colours make us feel happy or excited, while _______ colours make us feel sad.
exercises.explanation: Some … other … : một số … một số khác …

exercises.question: _______ of the students in my class could solve the problem yesterday.
exercises.explanation: None of + danh từ số nhiều = không ai trong số.

exercises.question: Although _______ was angered by the changes to the schedule last week, _______ attempts have been made yet to put matters right.
exercises.explanation: Everyone was angered; no attempts = chưa có nỗ lực nào.

exercises.question: Every morning, millions of _______ waste _______ time reading the sports pages.
exercises.explanation: Millions of us (tân ngữ); waste our time (tính từ sở hữu).
